description: Per-Company cache of Sage's account opening balances. Populated on demand from Erpnext Sbca Settings.

fields.label: Company
fields.description: Which ERPNext Company (= Sage tenant) this opening balance came from.

fields.label: Account Name
fields.description: Sage's raw account name (e.g. 'Unallocated Expense'). In ERPNext the same account is stored as '<name> - <company-letter>' — resolve at consumption time if needed.

fields.label: Opening Balance
fields.description: Sign convention follows whatever Sage returns. Negative values are kept as-is.

fields.label: Disabled
fields.description: Set to 1 automatically when the most recent Sage pull no longer returned this account. The row stays in place as historical record.

fields.label: Last Seen At
fields.description: Timestamp of the most recent Sage pull that returned this account.

name: Sage Account Opening Balance
